stocks.impact_theory: Lightwave Logic surged 41% amid broader market selloff due to Iran tensions and oil spikes. News of development agreement with Tower Semiconductor for high-speed modulators on silicon photonics platform ties into AI/data center boom. Economic implications: boosts AI infrastructure efficiency. Market psychology: flight to tech innovators. Historical parallels: similar surges in photonics stocks during 2023 AI hype. Analogies: like a turbocharger for data highways; rocket fuel for AI optics.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment positive on tech movers, web shows top gainer status despite market down on geopolitics. Earnings momentum and AI tie-in support further gains.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20% gains on AI hype continuation
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if offering dilution hits (recent $35M raise)
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Volatility from small cap, dilution, broader tech pullback on rates/oil.

stocks.justification: Strong price action and news, but small cap risks moderate confidence.
